headline: Charter Communications : Spectrum Expands Fiber Broadband Network in Clark County, Indiana Offering Gigabit Broadband, Mobile, TV and Voice Services
summary: JEFFERSONVILLE, Ind. - Spectrum, the #1 rural internet provider in the nation*, today announced the expansion of its fiber broadband network to bring Spectrum Internet, Mobile, TV and Voice services...
